log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Warforged — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Warforged — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 35 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!

--- Warforged — Bardic Musician --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
